notes: Kept component contracts stable (same exported props/types).
Improved status badge readability with human labels and data-state-group for empty/retry/active/done/error handling.
Improved error panel with kind-specific heading, retry guidance, validation empty-state hint, and assertive alert semantics.
Improved next-step card readability with display labels, data-empty marker, and urgency metadata.
No backend or runtime contract redesign performed.
